title: adhatoda cuneifolia
intro: Adhatoda cuneifolia, also known as Adhatoda vasica or Vasa, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits associated with Adhatoda cuneifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and prevent the growth of certain bacteria. Adhatoda cuneifolia is typically prepared as a herbal tea or used in the form of extracts, capsules, or powder, offering a natural remedy for various health conditions.
